description: A React component for the assignments management page in an insurance fraud detection platform. It handles retrieving, displaying, filtering, creating, and updating investigator assignments, including modal dialogs and UI elements.

methods.name: loadData
methods.description: Fetches assignments, investigators, and claims data concurrently and updates component state.

methods.name: handleCreate
methods.description: Handles submission of the form to create a new assignment, calls API, and refreshes data.

methods.name: handleStatusUpdate
methods.description: Updates the status of an assignment and refreshes the data.

methods.name: getInvestigatorName
methods.description: Returns full name for investigator ID or truncated ID if not found.

methods.name: getClaimNumber
methods.description: Returns claim number for claim ID or truncated ID if not found.

methods.name: getStatusBadge
methods.description: Returns CSS class based on assignment status for badge styling.
